## Checklist
- [ ] CI passes (lint, tests, build)
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated (if user-facing)
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or client-confidential material included
- [ ] New dependencies reviewed for license compatibility (no GPL/AGPL in proprietary code)
- [ ] Accessibility considered for UI changes
